description: Tower defense with 6 tower types, 3 upgrade tiers, A* pathfinding, 6 enemy types including healers and flyers, chain lightning, splash damage, economy with interest, 20 waves
prompt: Build a full tower defense game with HTML5 canvas. 20x14 grid map with winding enemy path. 6 tower types: Bolt (fast single-target), Flame (area burn), Arc (chain lightning hits 3), Frost (slows 40%), Cannon (splash damage), Sniper (long range instant). Each tower has 3 upgrade tiers. 6 enemy types: Scout (fast), Soldier (balanced), Tank (high HP), Healer (heals nearby), Flyer (ignores path), Boss (every 5 waves, shield regen). Economy with kill gold and 5% interest between waves. Tower selector panel, speed controls (1x/2x/3x), wave preview. 20 waves of increasing difficulty. Dark theme with neon accents.

tasks.subject: Create grid map and path system
Create projectile system with unique behaviors
Create 6 enemy types and wave system
Create HTML UI panels and overlays
Create styling for HUD and tower selector
